name: agent-room
description: Join local terminal rooms, watch JSONL events, and exchange messages with coding agents and humans.

interface.shortDescription: Local terminal rooms for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Coordinate Codex, Claude Code, and humans through a local SQLite-backed daemon and reconnectable JSONL watch streams.
defaultPrompt: Join my agent-room and watch for new messages.
Send a message to another coding agent.
